and conduct a high-risk district / municipal focused review of training status.

para_trans: District / Municipal Vaccination Task Force: -
1) Regular immunization programs and campaigns under them, and immunization-preventable diseases.
Detailed review of taluka and ward wise.
2) Quality of Micro-Plan for regular vaccination, devoid of immunization
Child immunization follow-up, child immunization services
Efforts are being made to bring the session site to the vacant sub-centre.
Alternative arrangements, cold chain equipment and other equipment, and training conditions.
Scope-focused assessment of over-risk.
3) To create a need for vaccination among all the general public and their active participation in vaccination.
Reviewing efforts made to record.
4) The vaccine administered under the routine immunization programme was administered in different directories.
The information received in accordance with the control report of the work and its quality is correct and reasonable.
Ensuring action through the stakeholders within the time frame.
5) Regular vaccination and other related activities of the government in various campaigns carried out under it.
To register the active participation of the department.
6) As per the decision taken in the previous District / Municipal Corporation Vaccination Task Force meeting.
Reviewing the compliance report.
